air-fryer-blueberry-crisp.name: Air Fryer Blueberry Crisp
instructions: Preheat an air fryer to 182°C (180 degrees C).
Combine blueberries, flour, lemon juice, and salt in a small bowl. Toss to coat, then divide the mixture between two 1-cup ramekins.
Combine oats, flour, brown sugar, and cinnamon for the topping in a small bowl. Mix in softened butter using a fork until mixture is crumbly. Sprinkle over the blueberries.
Place the ramekins in the air fryer basket and cook until the blueberries are warmed throughout and topping is golden brown, 12 to 14 minutes.

air-fryer-tofu.name: Air Fryer Tofu
instructions: Cut block of tofu in half vertically and set side by side on a plate lined with multiple layers of paper towels. Add a thick layer of paper towels on top, weigh down with a heavy object (I used my bread box) and press for 30 minutes to remove as much liquid as possible.
Cut tofu into 1-inch cubes and place in a bowl. Drizzle with soy sauce and carefully toss to coat.

Combine cornstarch, onion powder, paprika, and white pepper in a small bowl. Add to tofu and carefully coat tofu with cornstarch mixture. Drizzle with sesame oil. Place tofu pieces in one layer in the basket of your air fryer. You might need to work in batches.
Air-fry at 199°C (200 degrees C) for 6 minutes. Turn tofu pieces over and air-fry until crispy, about 6 more minutes.

almond-and-turkish-coffee-cookies-lezzet.name: Almond And Turkish Coffee Cookies
instructions: 1. Mix milk, vanilla, Turkish coffee and powder sugar in a large bowl.
2. Butter kneads egg yolks, flour and baking powder, and knead it to achieve a smooth dough.
3. Wrap the dough on stretch film and rest for 20 minutes in the refrigerator.
4. Take eggs in a bowl.
5. Remove walnut size parts from the chopped dough.
6. Round the shape with your hands and smear the powder almond after the egg whites first, and index the oiled paper serid oven tray.
7. Preheated Cook for 20 minutes in the oven of 170 degrees.
8. Serve cold.

almond-flour-muffin-recipe-lezzet.name: Almond Flour Muffin Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup of honey or apprentice (tack can be reduced)
1/4 cup olive oil or melted butter
1/2 cup milk (badem milk, oats milk or cow milk)
1 package embossing powder (can be preferred without any choice)
Brunette sugar or powder sugar (more healthy but alternative)
Herbal milk such as almond milk, soy milk, oat milk, coconut milk

instructions: 1. Woodworking at 180 degree.
2. Oil muffin moulds or place muffin kâpapers.
3. Mix eggs, honey (or swelling), milk, oil and vanilla thoroughly in a container.
4. blend almond flour, baking powder and salt in a separate container.
5. Then add the liquid mixture and mix it with spatula.
6. Share the mixture into muffin moulds u fill the fill in the fillet.
7. 18–22 minutes, u cook until light-girl.
8. Make sure the K&uuml tests from the back.
9. Wait for 5 minutes ago and without moulds euthen cool and wealth in the grid uniform.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

almond-pie-with-syrup-argiro.name: Almond Pie With Syrup
instructions: Mix the sugar with the eggs first.
Add the Melted butter, semolina, flour, orange zest, cinnamon, almonds and baking powder.
Spread the mixture for the almond pie into a medium baking pan which has been ground with some melted butter and baking for 35 ́-40′ at 180°C.
When our pie cools, pour it with the hot syrup we have in the meantime.
If you love almond, try making a sweet almond sponge.

almost-white-castle-hamburgers.name: Almost White Castle Hamburgers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).

Combine ground chuck, bread crumbs, egg, onion soup mix, water, and black pepper in a bowl; press into a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan. Prick holes through the chuck mixture for ventilation while cooking.
Bake in the preheated oven until browned and cooked through, about 10 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C). Drain excess grease.
Cut chuck mixture into squares the size of the rolls. Place 1 chuck patty in each roll.

amazingly-good-eggnog.name: Amazingly Good Eggnog
instructions: Combine milk, cinnamon, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla, and cloves in a saucepan over the lowest heat setting; stir and heat for 5 minutes. Increase heat to medium-low and slowly bring to a boil. Remove from the heat.
Whisk egg yolks in a large bowl until light yellow in color. Add sugar and whisk until light and fluffy.
Pour some of the hot milk mixture into the egg yolk mixture, whisking quickly to avoid scrambling the eggs. Continue adding hot milk and whisking to combine until all milk is incorporated.
Pour the mixture back into the saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick, about 3 minutes; do not allow the mixture to boil.
Strain to remove cloves and let cool for about 1 hour, then stir in cream, rum, remaining 2 teaspoons vanilla, and nutmeg. Refrigerate before serving, 8 hours to overnight.
Serve and enjoy!

anchovy-and-sardine-toasts-with-chile-bu.name: Anchovy And Sardine Toasts With Chile Butter
instructions: Place a rack in upper third of oven; heat broiler. Cut or tear bread slices in half, then arrange on a rimmed baking sheet. Brush or drizzle with oil (about 1 Tbsp. total). Broil until golden brown on top and just golden underneath, about 3 minutes (watch carefully; each broiler is different). Let cool 15 minutes (this will keep butter from melting when you spread it on).
Mix butter and chiles in a small bowl. Swipe some butter evenly over each toast (you may have some left over). Place an anchovy on 1 toast. Top remaining toasts with sardines.
Squeeze juice from a lemon half into a small bowl. Add parsley, season with salt, if desired, and drizzle a little oil over (it doesn’t need much). Toss well.
Scatter parsley salad over toasts and finely grate some zest from remaining lemon half on top.
See the rest of the Feast of the Seven Fishes menu here.

and-tasty-fish-soup-recipe-comedera.name: And Tasty Fish Soup Recipe
and-tasty-fish-soup-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de pescado fácil y sabrosa

ingredients.item: 1/2  kilo de filetes de pescado blanco
1 litro de fumet de pescado (de preferencia casero)

instructions: We're gonna peel the onion and garlic teeth, before we get them both into small pieces.
En el caso del perejil, lo lavaremos, lo escurriremos y picaremos las hojas finamente. Lo reservaremos aparte para usarlo en el final de la receta.
We're also gonna peel the carrot or mince it into wheels or cubes, as you prefer. Also, we'll peel the potato and we'll get them into cubes.
Finally, we will wash his pimenton and remove his head and his seed and his vein and we will mince him into Jolian or his notebooks, as you prefer.
Luego, vamos a agregar un chorrito de aceite en una olla y a calentarlo a fuego medio-bajo.
Once hot, we will drink onion and garlic there for 5 minutes, stirring often and keeping them from going to toast. Instead, the idea is that onion will start to become a little transparent.

After this time, we'll place the slice of bread into the pot, and let them cough for 5 minutes. We have to turn them around so they can have color from both sides. Another option is toast them in a toaster and then bring them to the pot.

We'll cut bread into crumbs with the help of a kitchen spatula and put it back onto the edge of the pot. Then we will also add the other vegetables (with the exception of parsley), we will pat the set and we will revamp for 5 minutes. They have to be turned around so they can have color from all sides.

We will soon water with brandy and with care, we will light with a lighter to awaken our preparations. If you do not feel comfortable with the idea of flabeado, you can simply let the set cook for a few minutes, so that alcohol will be reduced.
Luego vamos a agregar el tomate frito y a mezclar todo.
Now we'll be bathing with the fish stock. We'll cover the pot and let the soup cook for 20 minutes.
Mientras se cocina nuestro caldo, aprovecharemos para preparar los pescados y mariscos. El pescado ya debe estar limpio y listo para utilizarse. Entonces, vamos a trocearlo.

The locusts have to be peeled (and the wisest thing to have used their shells to prepare the fumet). The next thing we'll do, we'll heat up a frying pan with some oil. Once we get hot, we'll get some fish and seafood. We'll have them cook from both sides for up to 5 minutes. While they cook, we will pat slightly and water with the minced parsley we had booked.

We'll reserve the fish and the locusts for now, because after the soup's cooking time's up, we're gonna smash them. To do this, we can use a hand crusher and put it directly into the pot, or we can pass its contents to a beaker or kitchen robot.
Once the preparations have been crushed, we will put them back into the pot (if we have put them out). We'll add the locusts and fish to the soup, and we'll let everything cook for another 5 minutes.
We will use the time of this last cooking to try the soup, and if necessary, correct the season with a touch of salt and / or pepper.
Finally, we'll put out our soup and be ready to serve hot.

apfelkuchen-apple-cake.name: Apfelkuchen (apple Cake)
instructions: Beat 2 ¼ cups flour, milk, 1/4 cup sugar, yeast, 6 tablespoons butter, vanilla extract, and 1 pinch salt in a large bowl with an electric mixer on high until dough is smooth, about 5 minutes.
Spread into baking dish and press dough up the sides. Press apple slices into dough.
Mix 1 cup sugar, 3/4 cup flour, candied lemon peel, cinnamon, nutmeg, and 1 pinch salt in a bowl. Cut in 1/2 cup butter with a knife or pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Sprinkle over apples. Allow dough to rise for 30 minutes. Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Bake in preheated oven until cake is golden brown and apples are tender, about 35 minutes.

apple-cider-donuts.name: Apple Cider Donuts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Butter two 6-cup donut pans.

Pour apple cider into a saucepan and place over medium heat. Bring to a simmer and let it cook, watching carefully, until the cider is reduced to 1/2 cup. If it reduces too much, add enough water to make 1/2 cup. Set aside until needed.
Add flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, cardamom, and nutmeg to a large bowl. Mix with a whisk until combined and set aside until needed.

Whisk 1/2 cup white sugar, brown sugar, milk, 2 tablespoons melted butter, vanilla extract, and egg together in another bowl until combined. Add the apple cider reduction and the dry ingredients. Whisk together to form a slightly thick batter; do not overmix.
Spoon or pipe the batter into the prepared donut pans, filling them about 3/4 of the way up.

Bake in the center of the preheated oven until the tops are lightly browned, and the donuts spring back slightly to the touch, 10 to 12 minutes. Let cool for 10 minutes in the pans before removing to a sheet pan lined with a silicone baking mat. Cut out any donut holes as necessary.
If desired, while still slightly warm, brush the donuts lightly with remaining melted butter.
To make the coating: Mix 1 cup white sugar and 1 tablespoon cinnamon together in a shallow dish; toss donuts in sugar mixture to coat. Let cool completely before serving.

apple-fritter-pancakes.name: Apple Fritter Pancakes
instructions: Combine egg, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, kosher salt, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Whisk until well combined and lightly foamy. Add shredded apple and lemon juice and fold in with a spatula until well combined. Add flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Mix until flour disappears and batter is thick yet spoonable.

Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add tablespoonfuls of apple batter to the hot butter and cook until browned, about 3 minutes. Turn and cook until apple pancakes spring back to the touch and are browned on the other side, an additional 3 minutes.
Serve and enjoy!

apple-pie-without-eggs-argiro.name: Apple Pie Without Eggs
instructions: Heat half of the butter first (keep the remaining for the end) and add the crambs for a few minutes, until light. Set them aside to cool.
Clean the apples and cut them with a knife into pieces or thin slides. Place them in a large bowl.
Add the sugar, chestnuts, raisins, nuts, cinnamon and a pinch of salt. Mix well until the materials are combined.
Place anti-stick paper on a baking pan and spread two sets.
Sprinkle with the buttered crambs (we keep about 2 tabletspoons for the finish).
Spread the filling evening on the leaves, leaving a march of 2-3 cm around.
Brush with some water the timeter gap to stick the leaves.
Cover with the other two leads. We pinch the Edges well to Seal the Filling and Turn the Compounds down.
Slic the surface with a sharp knife.
Brush the surface with some of the Melted butter and sprinkle with the remaining buttered crambs and some sugar.
Bake in a well preheated oven, at 180–200°C, for about 30 minutes, until golden and crispy.

apple-souffle-lezzet.name: Apple Soufflé
instructions: 1. Peel the bark of apple & peel & slice it and slice.
2. melt the butter in the pan.
3. Add and melt brunette sugar.
4. Add and cook Apple slices.
5. Add to Creatine.
6. Light weight to the cream and after heating the mixture to the dressing area.
7. Take the white of the eggs.
8. Take the egg yolks, sugar and cream into a large glass bowl.
9. until the egg mites are like foam with mixer.
10. Add eggs to yellow mixture and mix it with slow movements with wooden spoon.
11. 11. 11. 11. Posted in examplesd butter melted.
12. Cook both face
12. August Take the sufleyi big service plate.
14 July Add warm apple slices to your car.
15. Sufleyi doubles and sprinkles powder sugar on the car.
16. Serve hot or warm.
17. September You can cook sufleyi in the grill.

aquavit-toddy.name: Aquavit Toddy

ingredients.item: Unfiltered apple juice or apple cider

instructions: Cook star anise, cardamom, and black peppercorns in a dry small saucepan over medium heat, stirring and crushing spices against side of saucepan, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add sugar and 2 Tbsp. water and bring to a simmer, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let cool. Strain into an airtight container and stir in honey (you should have about ¼ cup).
DO AHEAD: Syrup can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

Heat apple juice and spiced honey syrup in a small saucepan over medium-low, stirring occasionally, until steaming. Remove from heat and stir in aquavit and lemon juice. Serve in mugs garnished with star anise.

arctic-char-with-truffled-mashed-potatoe.name: Arctic Char With Truffled Mashed Potatoes, Sugar Snap Peas, And Truffle Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Sliced black truffles from jar plus 1 teaspoon juice from jar*
Chopped sliced black truffles from jar
- to 7-ounce arctic char fillets with skin

instructions: Blend first 4 ingredients in mini processor until well blended. Gradually add both oils and blend until thick and creamy. Season to taste with salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Let stand 1 hour at room temperature before serving.

Cook potatoes in pot of boiling salted water until tender, about 30 minutes. Drain potatoes. Cool slightly, then peel. Return potatoes to pot; add butter and mash. Mix in truffles and truffle oil, then enough milk by tablespoonfuls to moisten. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm over low heat before serving.

Preheat oven to 149°C. Butter rimmed baking sheet. Arrange fish, skin side down, on prepared sheet. Sprinkle fish with salt, pepper, and chives. Bake fish until barely opaque in center, 10 to 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, melt butter in large skillet over medium heat. Add sugar snap peas and 2 tablespoons water; sauté until peas are crisp-tender and water evaporates, about 4 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
Spoon mashed potatoes onto plates. Top with fish and sugar snap peas. Drizzle vinaigrette around fish and serve.

artichoke-with-citrus-peel-and-pine-nuts.name: Artichoke With Citrus Peel And Pine Nuts
artichoke-with-citrus-peel-and-pine-nuts.original_name: Citrus Shelled And Pine Peanut Enginar
instructions: 1. Leave cleaned in the water with lemon to divide and not decide.
2. Peel the peel of the onion and the yellowms.
3. Take half of the olive oil into the pan and roast 1 minute in the jealous fire of onions and garlic.
4. Add artichokes and continue roasting.
5. Taste Tuzla.
6. Add fine grated citrus shells and roast for 2-3 minutes.
7. Heat the remaining olive oil in another pan and roast the pine nuts to slightly pink.
8. Serve serpip on the meal.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

asian-pearshiso-salad-with-quinoa.name: Asian Pear–shiso Salad With Quinoa

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts finely chopped, dark green parts thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Shiso leaves or  0.25 cup mint leaves

instructions: Bring a large saucepan of salted water to a boil. Add quinoa, return to a boil, and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, 12–15 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Whisk together white and pale green scallion parts, chile, vinegar, 1 tsp. lime juice, and 1 tsp. honey in a large bowl. Add pear and cucumber; toss to coat. Season with salt; let salad sit 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk yogurt, sesame paste, a pinch of salt, remaining 1 tsp. lime juice, and remaining 1 tsp. honey in a small bowl until smooth.

Just before serving, toss salad with dark green scallion parts and shiso. Spread yogurt mixture over a shallow bowl. Using tongs, mound salad on top, leaving behind any liquid in bowl. Scatter sesame seeds and reserved quinoa over.

attitude-adjustment.name: Attitude Adjustment
instructions: Build in the shaker tin—first the simple syrup, then the lime, Chartreuse, and rum.
Taste. Miller High Life is deceptively sweet, so before the cocktail gets strained into your glass, it needs to be on the dry side.
Grab your Collins glass and add 4 ice cubes, then bottom with some of the beer; set aside.
Add 3 ice cubes to the shaking tin and Collins shake.
Taste again. Does it feel a little too hot and boozy right now? That’s okay! It’s going to mingle with the beer, which will stretch out the dilution.
Strain into the prepared Collins glass.
Serve the beer remaining in the pony bottle alongside the cocktail.
Garnish with the lime wheel.

autumn-kale-salad.name: Autumn Kale Salad

ingredients.prep: unpeeled and thinly sliced, seeds removed

ingredients.item: Of cayenne pepper or hot paprika

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400ºF. Trim about 1 inch off the head of the garlic, exposing the cloves. Drizzle 1 teaspoon of the olive oil on the garlic skins and rub it in. Wrap the garlic in aluminum foil and place on a baking sheet in the oven. Roast for 30 to 40 minutes, or until the individual cloves are completely soft. Remove from the oven and set aside.

At the same time as you roast the garlic, roast the squash. Place the squash pieces in a small bowl and coat with 2 tablespoons of the oil, 1 teaspoon of the salt, and the black pepper. Spread out the squash on a large baking sheet and roast for about 20 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the pieces are browned and cooked through. Set aside to cool to room temperature.

In a small bowl, stir together the remaining 4 tablespoons oil, vinegar, lemon juice, honey, remaining 1 teaspoon salt, and the cayenne (if using). Squeeze out the roasted garlic into the dressing. Stir well, breaking up the garlic. Set aside.

Wash and dry the kale thoroughly and slice it into thin strips. Place it in a large bowl and add the dressing a bit at a time, using your hands to massage the kale leaves gently until the volume is reduced and they look softened and shiny. You may have leftover dressing. Add the raisins, nuts, and squash pieces and toss.
Serve the salad at room temperature. Top with shaved Parmesan, if desired

avocado-margarita.name: Avocado Margarita
instructions: Toss salt and 1 tsp. lime zest on a small plate. Rub the rim of each margarita glass with lime wedge and dip into salt mixture.
Purée avocado, tequila, triple sec, lime juice, cilantro, cayenne, remaining 1 tsp. lime zest, and 2½ cups ice, preferably crushed, in a blender until smooth.
Divide among prepared glasses and garnish each with a lime wheel.

avocado-semifreddo-with-mint-and-chocola.name: Avocado Semifreddo With Mint And Chocolate
avocado-semifreddo-with-mint-and-chocola.original_name: Semifrio de abacate com hortelã e chocolate

ingredients.item: Granola, pistachios and mint to decorate
100 g de granola de aveia e chocolate

instructions: Line an English cake shape (11 x 20 cm), with a strip of vegetable paper, so that the ends are out of shape.

Prepare the mousse: scrape the gelatin leaves in cold water for 5 minutes. Break the chocolate into a bowl, add the condensed milk and melt it in a sea bath, stirring from time to time. Remove from the fire and add the rolled gelatin leaves, stirring well. On the other hand, beat the cream until it's firm, and mix it in chocolate. Lay the mousse in shape, sprinkle well with the granola and take it to the freezer for about an hour.

Prepare the avocado cream: scrape the gelatin leaves in cold water for 5 minutes. Put the water in a mug and heat it in the microwave. Drain the Jell-O and dissolve it in hot water. Cut the avocados in half, remove their lump and, with a spoon, remove the pulp for a blender. Add the washed mint leaves and sugar, turn on, then add the yoghurts and the dissolved gelatine and turn on a little more.

Remove the semi-cold from the freezer, cover it with the avocado cream and take it back to the freezer until solidify well. Deform, decorate with more granola, slightly broken pistachios and mint and serve cold, sliced.
